reasoning: The control 5.1.2 focuses on ensuring compliant patching of operating systems, which is typically managed by cloud provider services like AWS SSM, Azure Automation, GCP OS Config, etc. Kubernetes itself does not manage the underlying operating system patching of the nodes. This responsibility falls under the management of the infrastructure layer, which is outside the scope of Kubernetes. Therefore, there is no direct Kubernetes equivalent for this control.
title: Requirement 5.1.2
